CONTENT.Club career: Sacko made his professional debut in the Segunda Liga for Vitória de Guimarães B on 17 February 2016 in a game against Atlético CP.On 31 January 2022, the last day of the Portuguese transfer window, Sacko was loaned to Saint-Étienne. On 1 July 2022, he joined Montpellier on loan for the season.
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 10 July 2024As of match played 6 June 2024Scores and results list Mali's goal tally first, score column indicates score after each Sacko goal.
CONTENT.International career: Sacko made his international debut for the Mali national team in a 1–1 friendly tie with Japan on 23 March 2018.

SUMMARY: Falaye Sacko (born 1 May 1995) is a Malian professional footballer who plays as a right-back for  Ligue 1 club Montpellier and the Mali national team.
